CARDVALUEOVERLAY-SEARCH_BRANCH.title: Search branch
CARDVALUEOVERLAY-SEARCH_BRANCH.hover.des: Candidate continuations retained at each fully branched play. Higher values can improve search quality, but cost rises rapidly. Values above 3 are not recommended.
CARDVALUEOVERLAY-TURN_SEARCH_DEPTH.title: Turn search depth
CARDVALUEOVERLAY-TURN_SEARCH_DEPTH.hover: Maximum cards evaluated per simulated turn. Up to the first 8 plays use full branching; later plays continue along the single best line. Values above 8 are not recommended and may cause noticeable late-run stutter.
CARDVALUEOVERLAY-SIMULATION_RUNS.title: Simulation runs
CARDVALUEOVERLAY-SIMULATION_RUNS.hover.d: Monte Carlo runs per simulation. Higher values reduce sampling noise but increase waiting time. Values above the default 36 are not recommended.
